uptime_monitoring.description: Comprehensive uptime monitoring configuration for Node.js tutorial HTTP server

downtime_alert.subject: [DOWNTIME] {{ service_name }} is down
downtime_alert.message: Service {{ service_name }} has been down for {{ duration_minutes }} minutes. Last check failed at {{ timestamp }}.

recovery_alert.subject: [RECOVERY] {{ service_name }} is back online
recovery_alert.message: Service {{ service_name }} has recovered after {{ downtime_duration_minutes }} minutes of downtime.

degraded_performance_alert.subject: [PERFORMANCE] {{ service_name }} response time degraded
degraded_performance_alert.message: Service {{ service_name }} response time is {{ current_response_time }}ms, exceeding threshold of {{ threshold }}ms.

monitoring_concepts.uptime_calculation_methods: Demonstrates industry-standard uptime percentage calculation and SLA compliance tracking
monitoring_concepts.availability_monitoring: Shows comprehensive availability monitoring including endpoint validation and health correlation
monitoring_concepts.external_service_integration: Illustrates integration patterns with external monitoring services like Pingdom and UptimeRobot
monitoring_concepts.threshold_configuration: Teaches availability threshold configuration and status determination logic
monitoring_concepts.data_retention_strategies: Demonstrates monitoring data retention policies and historical data management

configuration_patterns.json_schema_validation: Shows JSON configuration design with comprehensive schema validation and documentation
configuration_patterns.environment_specific_settings: Demonstrates environment-aware configuration with development, test, and production settings
configuration_patterns.modular_configuration: Illustrates modular configuration design with separate sections for different monitoring aspects
configuration_patterns.extensibility_design: Shows configuration extensibility for adding new monitoring services and features
configuration_patterns.documentation_integration: Demonstrates inline documentation and configuration self-description patterns

monitoring_best_practices.sla_compliance_tracking: Teaches SLA definition, compliance monitoring, and availability target management
monitoring_best_practices.alerting_strategies: Shows alerting configuration including escalation rules and notification management
monitoring_best_practices.performance_correlation: Demonstrates correlation between uptime and performance metrics for comprehensive monitoring
monitoring_best_practices.incident_management: Illustrates incident detection, tracking, and resolution workflow configuration
monitoring_best_practices.reporting_automation: Shows automated reporting configuration for operational visibility and compliance documentation

configuration_validation.endpoint_url_validation: URLs validated for proper format, protocol specification, and accessibility
configuration_validation.threshold_logical_ordering: Thresholds validated for logical ordering and reasonable operational ranges
configuration_validation.timeout_hierarchy_validation: Timeout values validated for proper hierarchy and practical operational use
configuration_validation.interval_consistency_check: Check intervals validated for consistency and appropriate frequency
configuration_validation.sla_target_validation: SLA targets validated for achievable and industry-standard compliance levels

environment_adaptation.development: Configuration adapted for local development with localhost endpoints and console logging
environment_adaptation.testing: Test-specific configuration with fast intervals and simplified validation
environment_adaptation.production: Production-ready configuration with external endpoints, comprehensive monitoring, and alerting

scalability_settings.concurrent_monitoring: Configuration supports concurrent monitoring of multiple endpoints
scalability_settings.resource_optimization: Settings optimized for minimal resource consumption in educational context
scalability_settings.data_storage_limits: Data retention configured for educational use with reasonable storage limits

security_considerations.api_key_management: External service API keys handled through environment variables
security_considerations.endpoint_security: Monitoring endpoints configured with appropriate security considerations
security_considerations.data_privacy: Configuration ensures monitoring data privacy and prevents information disclosure
